candidate_definitions.text: ⚒️ Redocly CLI makes OpenAPI easy. Lint/validate to any standard, generate beautiful docs, and more.
[@Redocly](https://redocly.com) CLI is your all-in-one API documentation utility.
A community-created collection of configuration, plugins and techniques for getting the best from Redocly CLI in every situation.

A community collection of rulesets, configuration, custom plugins and other additions for [Redocly CLI](https://github.com/Redocly/redocly-cli). We know our users have some great tips, examples, and code to share, and this is the place to do just that. We would love to have your…
